'''Tejrivozs''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the trinary [[Star system/Legends|star system]] of [[Riflorii system|Riflorii]]. It was a colony of the [[Advozse/Legends|Advozsec]] and was controlled by a powerful crime family. It was left alone by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].<ref name="University" />

{{Planet-stub}}
